From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [SKA (disambiguation)](/w/index.php?title=SKA_(disambiguation)&redirect=no "SKA (disambiguation)"))

**SKA**, **Ska** or **ska** may refer to:

* [Acharnes Railway Center](/wiki/Acharnes_Railway_Center "Acharnes Railway Center"), station in Athens, Greece
* [Armed Forces Office (Germany)](/wiki/Armed_Forces_Office_(Germany) "Armed Forces Office (Germany)") (*Streitkräfteamt*)
* [Shotokan Karate of America](/wiki/Shotokan_Karate_of_America "Shotokan Karate of America")
* [Ska](/wiki/Ska "Ska"), a style of music
* *Ska* (leafhopper), a leafhopper genus in the tribe [Erythroneurini](/wiki/Erythroneurini "Erythroneurini")
* The Ska, a fictional ethnic group from the *[Lyonesse Trilogy](/wiki/Lyonesse_Trilogy "Lyonesse Trilogy")* by Jack Vance
* [SKA Brewing](/wiki/SKA_Brewing "SKA Brewing"), Durango, Colorado, US
* [Ska-P](/wiki/Ska-P "Ska-P"), a Spanish ska punk band
* [Square Kilometre Array](/wiki/Square_Kilometre_Array "Square Kilometre Array"), a radiotelescope project
* [Sachkhoj Academy](/wiki/Sachkhoj_Academy "Sachkhoj Academy"), a Sikh academy
* [Sparse Kogge–Stone adder](/wiki/Sparse_Kogge%E2%80%93Stone_adder "Sparse Kogge–Stone adder") in computing
* [Ska Keller](/wiki/Ska_Keller "Ska Keller") (born 1981) German politician
* The IATA airport code for [Fairchild Air Force Base](/wiki/Fairchild_Air_Force_Base "Fairchild Air Force Base")
* [National Trade Union Confederation of Finland](/wiki/National_Trade_Union_Confederation_of_Finland "National Trade Union Confederation of Finland") (Finnish: *Suomen Kansallinen Ammattikuntajärjestö*)

## Army sports clubs

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=SKA&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Army sports clubs")]

* [Armed Forces (sports society)](/wiki/Armed_Forces_(sports_society) "Armed Forces (sports society)"), SKA (Cyrillic: СКА, for "Sports Club of the Army"), in USSR countries

Kyrgyzstan

* Shoro-SKA Bishkek, now [FC Alga Bishkek](/wiki/FC_Alga_Bishkek "FC Alga Bishkek"), a Kyrgyz football club

Russia

* [FC SKA-Khabarovsk](/wiki/FC_SKA-Khabarovsk "FC SKA-Khabarovsk"), a Russian football club
* [FC SKA Rostov-on-Don](/wiki/FC_SKA_Rostov-on-Don "FC SKA Rostov-on-Don"), a Russian football club
* [HC SKA Khabarovsk](/wiki/HC_SKA_Khabarovsk "HC SKA Khabarovsk"), a Russian ice hockey club
* [SKA-Neftyanik](/wiki/SKA-Neftyanik "SKA-Neftyanik"), a Russian bandy club
* [SKA Saint Petersburg](/wiki/SKA_Saint_Petersburg "SKA Saint Petersburg"), a Russian ice hockey club
* [SKA-Sverdlovsk](/wiki/SKA-Sverdlovsk "SKA-Sverdlovsk"), a Russian bandy club

Tajikistan

* [SKA-Hatlon Farhor](/wiki/SKA-Hatlon_Farhor "SKA-Hatlon Farhor"), a Tajik football club

Ukraine

* [SKA Lviv](/wiki/SKA_Lviv "SKA Lviv")
* [SKA Odesa](/wiki/SKA_Odesa "SKA Odesa")
